channel.title: Syra on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Syra on Nature Works

item.title: Syra mulching
item.description:
Bark added to muddy seating area, chicken wire tree guards

On Friday 15th December, I added a trailer load of bark mulch to the upper seating area at the Syra woodland garden. http://localhost:1313/blog/231215-syra/
